label: cycle-frontier
headline_statement: Conjecture 1 is refuted: in the one-cell binary-outcome response-type LP below, \(\Gamma(P,0)=0\) but \(\Theta_I(P,0)=[4/5,1]\) and \(\Theta_L(P,0)=[2/5,1]\).
witness_construction_if_refuted: Single observed cell with binary outcomes, d=0, P(D=1,Y=1)=1/10, P(D=1,Y=0)=4/10, P(D=0,Y=0)=1/10, P(D=0,Y=1)=4/10; no cross-cell constraints, unrestricted copula tube, Manski marginal envelopes mu_1(1), mu_0(0) in [1/10,6/10]. The pasting graph has no cycles, so Gamma(P,0)=0, but the full response-type LP gives Theta_I(P,0)=[4/5,1] while the lifted coupling program gives Theta_L(P,0)=[2/5,1].
